message:
fix(ui): sidebar control alignment, mission button sizing, text overflow (#7083, #7084) (#7098)

Sidebar collapse/pin controls (#7083):
- Use consistent w-8 h-8 sizing for both collapse and pin buttons
- Add solid bg-background to pin button to prevent border bleed-through
- Use hover:bg-secondary for consistent hover states on both buttons

Mission sidebar empty state buttons (#7084):
- Switch from flex items-stretch to grid grid-cols-3 for uniform sizing
- Set fixed h-[72px] height so all buttons match regardless of text length
- Add truncate and max-w-full to prevent text overflow/overlap
- Add flex-shrink-0 to icons to prevent icon compression

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
